'''鈭歝h-th-ch''' ('''chathacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wheedle|wheedle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wheedle|wheedle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-th-ch
|-
! Lemma
| chathacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chathachithi|chathachithi]] || [[word:chathachiji|chathachiji]] || [[word:chathachishi|chathachishi]] || [[word:chathachi|chathachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathachuthuth|chathachuthuth]] || [[word:chathachujuj|chathachujuj]] || [[word:chathachushush|chathachushush]] || [[word:chathach|chathach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathachuthu|chathachuthu]] || [[word:chathachuju|chathachuju]] || [[word:chathachushu|chathachushu]] || [[word:chathachu|chathachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathachufuth|chathachufuth]] || [[word:chathachufuj|chathachufuj]] || [[word:chathachufush|chathachufush]] || [[word:chathachuf|chathachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chathachethe|chathachethe]] || [[word:chathacheje|chathacheje]] || [[word:chathacheshe|chathacheshe]] || [[word:chathache|chathache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathachothoth|chathachothoth]] || [[word:chathachojoj|chathachojoj]] || [[word:chathachoshosh|chathachoshosh]] || [[word:chathach|chathach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathachotho|chathachotho]] || [[word:chathachojo|chathachojo]] || [[word:chathachosho|chathachosho]] || [[word:chathacho|chathacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathachofoth|chathachofoth]] || [[word:chathachofoj|chathachofoj]] || [[word:chathachofosh|chathachofosh]] || [[word:chathachof|chathachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chathach忙th忙|chathach忙th忙]] || [[word:chathach忙j忙|chathach忙j忙]] || [[word:chathach忙sh忙|chathach忙sh忙]] || [[word:chathach忙|chathach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathachathath|chathachathath]] || [[word:chathachajaj|chathachajaj]] || [[word:chathachashash|chathachashash]] || [[word:chathach|chathach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathachatha|chathachatha]] || [[word:chathachaja|chathachaja]] || [[word:chathachasha|chathachasha]] || [[word:chathacha|chathacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathachafath|chathachafath]] || [[word:chathachafaj|chathachafaj]] || [[word:chathachafash|chathachafash]] || [[word:chathachaf|chathachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chathachasha|chathachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochathachasha|gochathachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichathachasha|gokichathachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chathachn眉sha|chathachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochathachnkn眉sha|gochathachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichathachn眉sha|gokichathachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chathachsh毛sha|chathachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochathachnksh毛sha|gochathachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichathachsh毛sha|gokichathachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chathachrosha|chathachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochathachnkrosha|gochathachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichathachrosha|gokichathachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chathachmusha|chathachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochathachnkmusha|gochathachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichathachmusha|gokichathachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chathachsherasha|chathachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochathachnksherasha|gochathachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichathachsherasha|gokichathachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chathachngasha|chathachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochathachnkngasha|gochathachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichathachngasha|gokichathachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chathachyasha|chathachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochathachnkyasha|gochathachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichathachyasha|gokichathachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chathachyamasha|chathachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochathachnkyamasha|gochathachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichathachyamasha|gokichathachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chathachn眉sh毛sha|chathachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochathachnkn眉sh毛sha|gochathachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichathachn眉sh毛sha|gokichathachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chathachn眉rosha|chathachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochathachnkn眉rosha|gochathachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichathachn眉rosha|gokichathachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chathachn眉musha|chathachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochathachnkn眉musha|gochathachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichathachn眉musha|gokichathachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chathachsh毛n眉sha|chathachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochathachnksh毛n眉sha|gochathachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichathachsh毛n眉sha|gokichathachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chathachsh毛rosha|chathachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochathachnksh毛rosha|gochathachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichathachsh毛rosha|gokichathachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chathachsh毛musha|chathachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochathachnksh毛musha|gochathachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichathachsh毛musha|gokichathachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chathachron眉sha|chathachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochathachnkron眉sha|gochathachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichathachron眉sha|gokichathachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chathachrosh毛sha|chathachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochathachnkrosh毛sha|gochathachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichathachrosh毛sha|gokichathachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chathachromusha|chathachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochathachnkromusha|gochathachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichathachromusha|gokichathachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chathachmun眉sha|chathachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochathachnkmun眉sha|gochathachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichathachmun眉sha|gokichathachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chathachmush毛sha|chathachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochathachnkmush毛sha|gochathachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichathachmush毛sha|gokichathachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chathachmurosha|chathachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochathachnkmurosha|gochathachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichathachmurosha|gokichathachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chathach|chathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙th忙ch|ch忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochathach|hochathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙th忙ch|hoch忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochathach|hohochathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙th忙ch|hohoch忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chathach|n眉chathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙th忙ch|n眉ch忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chathach|n眉n眉chathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙th忙ch|n眉n眉ch忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chathach|n茂chathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙th忙ch|n茂ch忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chathach|n茂n茂chathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙th忙ch|n茂n茂ch忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchathach|luchathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙th忙ch|luch忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchathach|luluchathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙th忙ch|luluch忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichathach|lichathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙th忙ch|lich忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichathach|lilichathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙th忙ch|lilich忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochathach|kochathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙th忙ch|koch忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochathach|kokochathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙th忙ch|kokoch忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechathach|kechathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙th忙ch|kech忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechathach|kekechathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙th忙ch|kekech忙th忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
